title: Manufacturing Engineer - Hero MotoCorp - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Hero MotoCorp - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Manufacturing Engineer with drive and ambition, Hero MotoCorp in Pune is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Hero MotoCorp:
Hero MotoCorp is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hero MotoCorp!
